scope: TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 Flash 4-layer 4xMI350 S4096 TileLang shared-KV selective activation-checkpoint probe

run.process_cleanup: Two orphaned remote multiprocessing children from the aborted run were killed; rocm-smi then showed all GPUs at 0 percent VRAM except the resident gpuagent process with 0 DRM devices.

observed.root_cause_summary: Ranks hit GPU memory access faults immediately after first-use TileLang compiles and before any train-step metric. Torch elastic reported rank 1 as the first observed failure with SIGABRT; rank 0 received SIGTERM. Python stacks point through torch.utils.checkpoint selective recompute_fn and unpack_hook during loss.backward().

partial_timing_read.why: The timing files contain only three records per rank and include first-use TileLang compile/warmup. The run failed before step 1 completed.
partial_timing_read.interpretation: The multi-second TileLang numbers here are compile/warmup polluted and should not be compared with the warmed full-AC TileLang profile where the layer-2 inner dKV body is about 8.2 ms per call.

decision.read: TileLang remains promising for sparse attention, but this selective activation-checkpoint branch is currently a stability bug, not a throughput lever. The current composed bottleneck remains MoE routed backward, owner-rank VJP math, dX return skew, and full-AC recompute.

next_actions: Keep using full activation checkpointing for the promoted TileLang/MORI profile until selective AC is isolated on a smaller smoke.
If selective AC is needed, test it first on a dense or guarded baseline, then on shared-KV without TileLang, then on shared-KV TileLang at S512/S1024 before returning to S4096.
For bottleneck closure, prioritize MoE backward decomposition and overlap work; keep TileLang attention work focused on prewarm/cache and reducing selected-state bridge overhead.
commands: ssh do-sonle5-mi350-gpu 'grep -n "Applied selective activation checkpointing\|TileLang begins to compile\|Data race detected\|Memory access fault\|Root Cause\|recompute_fn\|unpack_hook\|step:" /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/logs/torchtitan_dsv4_tilelang_selective_ac_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps3_20260604/docker-run.log | tail -120'
